note: 2-story house, small footprint similar to house #3 (8.50m x 10.00m). Named grid confirmed identical on S-02 (spread footing plan) and S-03 (pile footing plan). Named grid E is the topmost named row per spec convention, so rows above it take a NEGATIVE pos_m. DUMMY GRIDS: as of 2026-07-20 this master carries 10 user-supplied dummy lines -- x: 1'(-0.6), 1''(1.1), 1'''(2.3), 1''''(3.3), 3'(9.1); y: E'(-2), E''(-1.1), A'(1.6), E'''(4.2), C'(6.6). All were given directly by the user (confidence 1) rather than derived by extraction; the pre-existing E' row (C0-marked footings at col1/col2 only, originally recorded at -1.9 from S-02/S-03) was corrected to -2 in the same pass. NOTE ON LABEL NAMING: several prime labels are NOT spatially adjacent to their base letter -- A'(1.6) and E'''(4.2) both sit in the E-to-C range, not near named A or beside E' -- recorded exactly as given by the user, not normalized or assumed to be typos.

y_lines.source: S-02 and S-03, C0-marked footing/column row at col1 and col2 only (no col3), ~1.90-2.00m before named grid E on both sheets. CONFIRMED_2026-07-16: column schedule S-09 (หน้า38_column_schedule.json) independently confirms C0 as a real short column (200x200 at ตอม่อ, terminating at ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 -- does not rise to floor 2 or roof), a 3rd independent structural sheet agreeing. The architecture floor plan (หน้า06) does NOT show a matching dimensioned zone at this exact offset -- its own ~2.00m zone above gridE is explicitly noted as a different feature, not confirming or contradicting this dummy grid.

building_footprint_note: Full 3x5 grid of footings/columns present at every intersection (1-2-3 x E-D-C-B-A) on both S-02 and S-03, plus the E' dummy row (col1/col2 only, no col3), and row A is missing col1 (only col2/col3 present at row A). Column marks: C0 (dummy row E' only), C1A (perimeter corners), C1 (main grid), C2 (interior, col2 at rows D/C). NOTE_2026-07-20: this note describes the NAMED-grid + E' footing layout only, as read from S-02/S-03; the 9 other dummy grids added 2026-07-20 have NOT yet been checked against any sheet's footing/column layout -- that cascade is pending.
warnings: ⚠️ CASCADE PENDING (2026-07-20): 9 new dummy grids were added by the user this session -- x: 1'(-0.6), 1''(1.1), 1'''(2.3), 1''''(3.3), 3'(9.1); y: E''(-1.1), A'(1.6), E'''(4.2), C'(6.6) -- plus E' corrected -1.9 to -2. NONE of them has been cascaded into this house's 26 pattern=plan files yet, and none has been cross-checked against a source image. Every entry carries confidence 1 because the user supplied the value directly, NOT because it was verified by extraction. Do that cascade before treating this master as settled.

The old 3-way offset discrepancy north of grid E (1.90m on S-02/S-03 vs 2.00m on S-04 vs 1.10m on S-05 floor-2) is now PARTLY accounted for: E' sits at -2 (the S-04 reading, set by user) and the new E''(-1.1) lands exactly on the S-05 floor-2 reading, so the two are plausibly two real, distinct features rather than one ambiguous one. The original 1.90m S-02/S-03 figure is the value that no longer has a grid line of its own -- confirm against S-02/S-03 whether 1.90 vs 2.00 is a genuine second feature or just a rounding/reading difference on the same line.

SUPERSEDED_2026-07-19 note (kept for history): that pass concluded 'no additional dummy grid candidates found in the pattern=plan files beyond E'.' The user has since supplied 9 more by hand, so that conclusion no longer stands -- it reflected what the extraction could find unaided, not what exists on the drawings.
